programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The wrath of Mann is upon the contestants as Don doles out punishments to the entire squad for one person’s mistake. On the tails of the punishment, Don leads everyone in a lesson on BUD/S training. Later, co-host and retired Green Beret, Mike Glover, gives the contestants a life lesson on survival they won’t soon forget. To top off the episode, one of the contestants demonstrates his industry-changing hollow point bullets in some meaty targets.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: In this episode, competitor James gives us an update on how his injuries are progressing and how he’s able to push through when most thought he would be long gone. Luckily for the competitors, he had a special demonstration ready that involved hollow points and gel blocks. Later, Matthew recaps his experience with “The Glove”. To cap things off, Chris also sits down with BodyHz to talk about innovations in the non-chemical health industry.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: T-minus one day to the mission, and the All-Stars are feeling the pressure. With a warm-up course of fire under their belts, the team levels up to some serious firepower—thanks to the experts at Capitol Armory. Just when they think the day can’t get any more intense, Don sends them sky-high for a one-of-a-kind shooting challenge aboard the Capitol Armory chopper. Once back on solid ground, the All-Stars dive into critical training scenarios designed to make or break their mission success. With time ticking down and expectations mounting, the team must dig deep, trust their instincts, and come together like never before.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Tim Harmsen trains at Summit Point, testing rapid-fire shooting and vehicle combat tactics. At Fort Sumter, he reflects on the Civil War’s legacy with a 100-gun salute. Then it’s off to Avidity Arms, where Rob Pincus joins him to explore real-world home defense. From tactical holsters to high-speed vehicle drills, Tim puts it all to the test in a live-fire evolution under pressure.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: In this episode of Wild Shots, Tim Harmsen heads to the heart of American gun craftsmanship with an exclusive, behind-the-scenes tour of Palmetto State Armory, where freedom is literally built on the production floor. From the anodizing line to live assembly, Tim witnesses American ingenuity in action as a rifle comes to life before his eyes. With the epic 10,000-Round Challenge complete, it’s time for some serious maintenance. The crew at SEAL 1 steps in with their cutting-edge nanotechnology to give the battle-worn BCM AK the deep clean it deserves. Once the guns are gleaming, it’s time to send rounds downrange. Teaming up with top firearms influencer Sootch, Tim takes aim at a new challenge, including a 1,000-yard Wild Shot that pushes precision, patience, and performance to the limit.

From the iconic, mist-covered island of Lake Bled to the thunderous, turquoise rapids of the Soča River, this film explores the pristine beauty of Slovenia’s Julian Alps. Witness the sunlight filtering through ancient beech forests and the quiet majesty of limestone peaks in a cinematic tribute to one of Europe’s best-kept natural secrets.

programme.title: University of Texas Documentary
programme.desc: 3 years ago, pro lacrosse player Kyle Hartzell stepped on the campus of University of Texas at Austin as their new club lacrosse team head coach. Now they are a top MCLA program competing for championships. TLN went to Austin, TX during the most anticipated game of the Longhorn's season to uncover what makes their program so special.

programme.title: Trevor Baptiste: Pressure, Expectations, and What Comes Next
programme.desc: Kyle Harrison sits down with Trevor Baptiste - the most dominant faceoff athlete of his generation - for an honest conversation about mentality, evolution, pressure, and the moments that shaped his journey to becoming an all-time great. From a chance clinic in eighth grade to a national championship as a freshman, Baptiste opens up about staying even-keeled, proving himself year after year, and why he still believes his best lacrosse is ahead of him.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: Welcome to Episode 13 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show presented by Duke Cannon. In this episode, we break down everything that happened in the NCAA Quarterfinals and look ahead to the Championship Weekend matchups. The crew also welcomes Matt Nestler on the show to discuss the news he broke about Lars Tiffany being out as head coach at Virginia, then we chop it up with the boys from The D3 Pod.

programme.title: S1E1 Draft Story
programme.desc: In Part 1, we uncover the story of Tyvis Powell and the people who shaped him into the man and football player he is today. His road to the NFL was anything but easy, and it nearly never happened without the guidance of his mentor, Sean Williams. A Draft Story is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he makes the leap to professional football. Though he was not invited to Chicago for the 2016 NFL Draft, his journey is unforgettable. Witness the tension, hope, and emotion as Tyvis waits for the call that will change his life and etch the Powell name into NFL history. This is his Draft Story.

programme.title: S1 E2 Draft Story
programme.desc: A Draft Story” Part 2 is a GoPro Original Production that follows Ohio State safety Tyvis Powell as he takes the leap into professional football. Facing unexpected challenges, honoring a promise to local kids, and navigating a situation he never imagined, Tyvis proves that the journey to the NFL is full of twists, heart, and determination.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Son of the Renegade, 1942
programme.desc: The son of a notorious outlaw grows up unaware of his father’s criminal past. As he comes of age, he is drawn into a conflict between lawmen and outlaws, forcing him to confront the truth about his heritage. Struggling between loyalty and justice, he must decide whether to follow in his father’s footsteps or forge his own path on the side of the law.

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: High Lonesome 1950, John Drew Barrymore
programme.desc: A young drifter accused of murder must prove his innocence while being hunted across the frontier by a determined posse

programme.title: Hard Hombre -Hoot Gibson 1931
programme.desc: A mild-mannered cowboy is mistaken for a feared outlaw and must live up to the tough reputation while confronting real criminals on the frontier

programme.title: Joshua - 1979
programme.desc: A hardened Civil War veteran, played by Fred Williamson, returns home to find his family brutally murdered by outlaws. Driven by vengeance, he sets out across the frontier on a relentless hunt for the killers, confronting violence, betrayal, and his own past along the way

programme.title: Dead Aim
programme.desc: A traveling gravedigger during an (unspecified) war adopts a orphan he finds alone in the desert. After the war with the orphan grown and business slow, the orphan begins to generate business himself by shooting people

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw
programme.desc: Dan Ward, reformed and last member of an outlaw family, meets Molly Clark in a rocky draw near town. Ted Wells, a henchman for Dan's enemy Jim Swain, attempts to shoot Dan but is outdrawn and killed by the latter. Molly disappears and Dan learns that she and Wells had ridden there together.

programme.title: Westward Bound
programme.desc: Learning that Montana is about to become a state and that property values will rise rapidly, Caldwell is using his outlaw gang to force the ranchers off their land. To fight back Tuttle sends for the Trail Blazers and unaware of Maynard's identity, Caldwell appoints him Marshal.

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos 1941
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in Robin Hood of the Pecos, a stirring tale set in the turbulent days after the Civil War. When corrupt officials exploit and oppress Texas ranchers, Roy rises as a champion of the people—fighting injustice with his six-guns and his songs. With the help of Gabby Hayes and heroine Marjorie Reynolds, he takes on the villains to bring peace and fairness back to the frontier. Filled with action, music, and Roy’s trademark charm, this Western delivers justice in true outlaw-hero style.

programme.title: Tombstone Canyon
programme.desc: Maynard hears the cry of the weird masked "phantom" of Tombstone Canyon. The plot thickens when Maynard discovers a man with a key to his past has been murdered by the phantom.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot: Acclaimed Screenwriter, Fashion MC, & Hip Influencer Dole Out Top Hot Spots
programme.desc: Why is Kansas City's fashion scene thriving? Craving a horchata latte? Best pizza on planet Earth? Local experts Jordan Gallant, Jasmine Green, and Aaron Rahsaan Thomas have all the answers, including where to go for a new hairstyle and a pep talk.
